settings.text: Phillis Meti — 5× World Long Drive Champion and World Record Holder — offers private, group, and junior lessons at Northcrest Golf.

settings.title: 5× World Long Drive Champion
settings.text: Phillis Meti has won the World Long Drive Championship five times — making her one of the most decorated competitors in the sport's history.

settings.title: World Record Holder
settings.text: Holding the world record for longest drive, Phillis brings elite-level technique and insight to every lesson she teaches.

settings.title: Head Professional at NCDR
settings.text: Based at Northcrest Golf since 2019, Phillis works with players of all levels — from first-timers to competitive amateurs.

settings.title: Private Lessons
settings.text: One-on-one sessions tailored to your specific game. 30 or 60 minutes. Available weekdays and weekends.

settings.title: Group Clinics
settings.text: Small group sessions (4–6 players) focused on specific skills. Great value and a social experience.

settings.title: Junior Academy
settings.text: Programs for players ages 8–17. Structured curriculum, fun environment, real improvement.
